title: Invisivible falling leaves
description: it is making falling leaves invisible
body:
# Invisible falling leaves
Do you dont like these new falling leaves? Then use this Resource pack it is simply making them Invisible. There are multyplie Versions of it so you can choose your favorite, there is one that is making all falling leaf particels invisibile and others which arent removing the Cherry or Pale oak ones + combiantion. 

If you like this texture pack, try my others from my Invisible leaf collection too.

**Make sure the resource pack is above the others.**


**Without texture pack**
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65de9bdfd20e4362d42e02e4720571beaa2944bc.png)
**With the texture pack**      ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6fd8a624a1d317ccbadd8d9579facdbba480a0f.png)


[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ)
